message:
Command `# Now patch the ODB files - the ODB is a binary OpenROAD database. 
# The actual pin placement comes from the DEF template applied at step 24/44.
# The ODB may still have the port as a terminal. We need to patch it using OpenROAD.
# Find which ODB files the GlobalPlacement step reads from
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/44-odb-applydeftemplate/ -name "*.odb" 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check if openroad can delete a port from an ODB
which openroad` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Now patch the ODB files - the ODB is a binary OpenROAD database.

echo "---"
# Check if openroad can delete a port from an ODB
which openroad"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# Now patch the ODB files - the ODB is a binary OpenROAD database. 
# The actual pin placement comes from the DEF template applied at step 24/44.
# The ODB may still have the port as a terminal. We need to patch it using OpenROAD.

echo "---"
# Check if openroad can delete a port from an ODB
